creator: ports@thelanman.net
text:
Created attachment 188529
Makefile diff

Makefile patch to allow for a builds on systems with a DEFAULT_VERSIONS of python=3.6 when the Python OPTION is enabled.

net-snmp doesn't seem to build with anything newer than Python 2.7 for me. Short term fix is to make it work with FLAVORS.

Makefile diff attached.
